creator: ben@stuyts.nl
text:
The source file for this port (http://www.pdflib.com/binaries/PDFlib/700/PDFlib-Lite-7.0.0p3.tar.gz) is no longer available. It has been updated to http://www.pdflib.com/binaries/PDFlib/702/PDFlib-Lite-7.0.2.tar.gz.

Fix: Apply attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/print/pdflib
make fetch
